task_summary: Repair stale CI/CD contract-test assertion: update the apps/api/.env.example DB_HOST assertion to match the documented hybrid-dev default (127.0.0.1), and fix the missing MEDIA_STORAGE_PATH env var in the API runtime process check so the full suite passes.
validation_outcome: All validations pass. bash cicd/tests/run-validations.sh passes in full. pnpm lint, typecheck, and test all pass.

The env-example assertion matches the canonical contract in docs/operations/launch.md (DB_HOST=127.0.0.1)
A compose-level DB_HOST=mysql override assertion exists at the verified real location (line 320 in cicd/tests/run-validations.sh already pinned this)
test_location_guidance: cicd/tests/run-validations.sh is both the product and the test — tester executes bash cicd/tests/run-validations.sh directly
cicd/tests/README.md should be reviewed for coverage description alignment
implementation_context: apps/api/.env.example line 44 has DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 (hybrid-dev default; comment on lines 40-43 documents why)

cicd/docker/compose.prod.yml has no DB_HOST override — prod uses host-managed external MySQL
MEDIA_STORAGE_PATH=/tmp/uploads added to API runtime process check (was missing, causing container startup failure)
